> A modern food landing page where users can explore delicious dishes and book 


## Main pages

- Home
    https://sage-starlight-e2609b.netlify.app/

- Table Booking 
    https://sage-starlight-e2609b.netlify.app/register.html

## Features
    
    - Food menu
    - Online table booking 
    - Catering service
    - Memership
    - Delivery services
